creator: brooks@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Xin LI from comment #12)

What's the way forward for an EN?  Should I request merges from stable branches to releng/(8.4|9.3|10.0|10.1)?  I think we'll want to get 10.0 updated ASAP since people are going to be rushed and not paying enough attention once 10.1 gets its first post-February  advisory.
